name: New Orleans Spinach Crabmeat Casserole
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Frozen Chopped Spinach (thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and drain the frozen chopped spinach.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. In a heavy skillet, melt the butter and sauté onions and green onions until soft but not brown.
4. Add the spinach, sour cream, and cheese. Reduce heat and simmer until heated throughout.
5. Add the artichoke hearts, salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce; simmer for 2-3 minutes.
6. Gently fold in the crab meat and shrimp.
7. Pour the mixture into a 2-quart casserole.
8. Refrigerate or bake for 20-30 minutes.
